auth.register_success: Account created successfully. Check your email to activate your account.
auth.otp_sent: An OTP code has been sent to your email address.
auth.otp_invalid: Invalid or expired OTP code. Please try again.
auth.otp_expired: This OTP code has expired. A new one has been sent.
auth.account_inactive: Your account is inactive. Check your email.
auth.account_not_verified: Please verify your account via the email you received.
auth.email_already_exists: This email is already in use.
auth.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters long, include an uppercase letter and a number.
auth.password_reset_sent: If this email exists, a reset link has been sent.

user.account_deleted: Your account has been deleted and your data anonymized (GDPR).

subscription.already_subscribed: You already have an active subscription.
subscription.cancelled: Subscription cancelled. Your access remains active until {end_date}.
subscription.expired: Your subscription has expired. Renew to continue.
subscription.plan_not_found: This subscription plan does not exist.

payment.success: Payment validated successfully. Receipt sent by email.
payment.failed: Payment failed. Check your balance and try again.

market.api_unavailable: The market data service is temporarily unavailable.
market.no_data: No data available for this instrument.

prediction.insufficient_data: Insufficient data for prediction (minimum 7 days of history required).
prediction.model_error: Predictive engine technical error. Please try again shortly.
prediction.profile_incomplete: Complete your profile to receive personalized recommendations.

simulation.file_too_large: File exceeds the maximum allowed size (10 MB).
simulation.file_unreadable: Unable to read this file. Make sure it is not corrupted.
simulation.analysis_queued: Your document is being analyzed. You will be notified by email.
simulation.insufficient_info: Insufficient information in the document to perform a complete analysis.

notification.otp_email_body: Your OTP code is: {code}. It expires in {minutes} minutes.

errors.internal: An internal error occurred. Our teams have been notified.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.validation: Invalid data. Please check the submitted fields.
errors.rate_limit: Too many requests. Wait {seconds} seconds before trying again.
